name: Typical Relay Set Command
description: Common operation: turn on relay 0. Tests CRC with small 2-byte payload.
purpose: Typical use case: verify algorithm with small payload

input.description: Header=0x55AA, Seq=0x02, Cmd=0x10 (RELAY_SET), Len=0x0002, Payload=[0x00, 0x01] (Relay 0, State ON)

expected_complete_packet.description: Complete packet bytes including CRC and footer
expected_complete_packet.structure: Header(2) + Seq(1) + Cmd(1) + Len(2) + Payload(2) + CRC(2) + Footer(1) = 11 bytes total

real_world_scenario.description: User clicks relay 0 ON button in web UI
flow: User clicks relay 0 ON in web interface
Frontend sends WebSocket message to daemon
Daemon creates this packet and sends to firmware
Firmware validates CRC, recognizes RELAY_SET, sets relay 0 to ON
Daemon processes ACK and notifies UI

testing_notes: This is the most common packet type in normal operation
Use this vector to verify daemon CRC implementation
Integration test: send this from daemon, capture response from firmware
Verify firmware turns on relay 0 as expected
